title: Why am I not receiving the itemId when I click a button from an automation?

posts.author: ianhunter373 (IH)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why am I not receiving the itemId when I click a button from an automation?

Screen Shot 2024-01-27 at 4.40.04 PM1068×854 40.9 KB

[0] {
[0]   blockKind: 'action',
[0]   inboundFieldValues: { boardId: #########, columnId: 'text', targetColumnId: 'files' },
[0]   inputFields: { boardId: ########, columnId: 'text', targetColumnId: 'files' },
[0]   recipeId: #######,
[0]   integrationId: #######
[0] }
...
[0] { boardId: #######, columnId: 'text', targetColumnId: 'files' }

posts.author: ianhunter373 (IH)
posts.cookedHtml: Nvm, missed the checkbox of the item field to the action in the recipe.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: I am glad you found the source of the issue @ianhunter373 !!
